summary: The diff implements the new Add Questions route/flow with heuristic question-type auto-detection and adds top-of-screen "Add Questions" buttons on Home and Question Bank. It also updates the specified help text on Question Bank and AI Assistant. Several requested items—logo upload/persistence and institute name editing/rendering, export/print image-table rendering fixes, and the Board+Standard screen text/empty-state copy—are not evidenced in the provided diff summary. The diff also includes multiple unrelated changes (URL/session param utilities, admin token access control init, theme/token updates, onboarding and OCR/UI changes) that were not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix mobile/desktop layouts so bottom action buttons never overflow outside the visible viewport on all affected screens (including Question Bank, AI Assistant, editor/preview/export screens) and ensure floating buttons do not cover critical bottom CTAs.
missing_requirements.reason: Some screens add a "page-with-floating-ui" class and the floating AI button uses z-40, but the diff summary does not show concrete layout/padding/positioning fixes across all listed affected screens (notably editor/preview/export) nor specific safeguards that bottom CTAs are never covered/cut off. Evidence is incomplete for the full scope.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add Questions flow supports manual entry/paste of one or multiple questions into the personal Question Bank, capturing Board and Standard for storage (not routing into paper sections/headings).
missing_requirements.reason: An Add Questions page exists and saves questions with board/standard to personal bank, but the diff excerpt is truncated and does not clearly evidence support for pasting/entering multiple questions in a single operation (beyond adding drafts one-by-one) or the full end-to-end acceptance criteria (e.g., post-save navigation to the correct board/standard listing in "My Questions").

missing_requirements.requirement: Update Board+Standard screen help text to exactly "Find questions using question type" and replace the empty-state label with exactly "No questions added yet.\nStart by selecting add questions ."
missing_requirements.reason: Question Bank and AI Assistant texts are shown updated, but the diff summary for the Board+Standard screen does not show the updated help/description string nor the empty-state copy. The provided excerpt focuses on filtering and selection logic and is truncated before any empty-state rendering.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix Teacher Profile logo upload: enable file input, accept image files, persist in stored profile data, and display in profile + paper editor header + export/print preview.
missing_requirements.reason: The file summary explicitly describes the Profile screen as having a "logo upload placeholder" and the diff does not provide evidence of an enabled image input, persistence wiring, or logo rendering in editor/export/preview.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (ProfileWireframe described as logo upload placeholder)

missing_requirements.requirement: Make institute name editable in the paper editor and ensure clean logo+institute layout in editor and exported/printed output using the edited value.
missing_requirements.reason: No diff evidence shows UI/controls for editing institute name per paper, nor layout changes in the paper editor header or export/print preview that use the overridden name.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (PaperEditorWireframe summary does not mention institute name editing or logo layout)

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure images and tables render correctly in export/print preview and print/PDF output (auto-resize images to margins, preserve aspect ratio, tables not clipped).
missing_requirements.reason: No diff evidence shows print/export CSS or rendering logic changes to constrain images/tables within printable bounds. The export/preview file is mentioned but no specific image/table handling changes are shown in the provided summary.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (ExportPrintPreviewWireframe summary does not mention image/table print fixes)

hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention admin tokens, URL param persistence, or initializing access control with a secret; it focuses on Add Questions flow/UI fixes, logo/name editing, and print rendering.
